hero.title: Book appointments from specialists, without calls or stressful coordination
hero.subtitle: Top specialists near you. Compare, check real availability, and book easily.

card.title: Booking with real-time calendar
card.desc: See real availability—no overlaps, no “call later”.
card.city_sub: More specialists will be added over time.

step1.title: Search and compare
step1.desc: Choose service, city, and time; check prices and ratings.

step2.title: Book with accurate calendar
step2.desc: Pick the best time; scheduling conflicts are removed.

step3.title: Service + feedback
step3.desc: The service is completed; share your experience.

footer.about_description: A bridge connecting customers with verified professionals; transparency, security, and an excellent user experience.

search.title: Providers
search.subtitle: Search by provider name or service — then book.

faq.title: Help & FAQ
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions. If you can’t find yours, contact us.

acc.title: Signup & Login
acc.desc: Create account, login with phone and password, SMS verification if required.

booking.title: Booking & Payment
booking.desc: Instant booking, deposit, cancellation and refund rules.

trust.title: Trust & Safety
trust.desc: Provider verification, quality guarantee, and reporting.

items.a: On the signup page, enter your phone number, password, and account role. If SMS verification is enabled, you will receive a code.
Use the password recovery option. Login is done with phone number and password, and some accounts require SMS verification.
Select an available time, pay the deposit, and the booking is held until final confirmation.
Yes, identity and background are checked, and a verification badge is shown.

items.q: How does the quality guarantee work?

dynamic.cancel: Cancellation is free up to {hours} hours before the start time. For closer times, final penalty details are being completed.
dynamic.refund_with_amount: If dissatisfaction is confirmed, refunds are issued up to {amount} toman.
dynamic.refund_fallback: Refund policy details are being finalized and will be announced on the policy page.

header.title: Terms, Privacy & Policies
header.description: Our goal is transparency and a secure experience. This page explains what is allowed, what data we collect, and how cancellation and refund policies work.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: Platform usage framework and responsibilities
items: Reservations are valid based on announced times.
ServiceHub may suspend accounts in case of violations.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Transparency about data usage
privacy.description: Your data such as name, phone number, and booking history are used only to provide and improve services.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.subtitle: For security and better experience
cookies.description: Cookies are used for secure login and improving user experience.

cancellation.title: Cancellation & Refund
cancellation.subtitle: Fair policies regarding time and commitments

highlights.label: Late Cancellation
highlights.note: Part of the deposit may be deducted

highlights.label: No‑show
highlights.note: If the customer does not inform in advance

free.after: before service start: full deposit refund.

late.after: is recorded as a cancellation fee.

important.title: Important
important.text: If a dispute occurs, first contact support through the app so the issue can be reviewed and resolved faster.

form.title: Contact Form
form.description: Please enter your information accurately so we can respond faster.
form.name: Full Name *
form.agree: I have read and agree to the terms and privacy policy.
form.footer: By sending this message, you agree that your contact information may be used to follow up.

success.title: Your message was received ✅
success.description: It was sent successfully. If follow-up is needed, we will reply to this email.

errors.mustAgree: You must agree to the terms.
errors.tooFast: Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.serverError: Error sending message. Please try again later.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.description: Have a question, suggestion or issue? Your message goes directly to our team.

cooldown.wait: To prevent spam please wait {seconds} seconds before sending again.

overall.title: 1) Overall rating (out of 5)
overall.desc: A single overall score summarizing the experience.

feedback.title: 3) Written feedback
feedback.desc: Text reviews explain why a rating was high or low. Offensive or irrelevant content is removed.

criteria.punctuality: Punctuality and adherence to booking time

reply.title: Provider reply rights
reply.desc: Providers can respond respectfully under a review to clarify issues.
reply.goalDesc: Turn feedback into real improvement, not conflict.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Why are some reviews not displayed?
faq.a1: Content containing insults, personal data, ads, or irrelevant material is removed.
faq.q2: The rating seems unfair. What should I do?
faq.a2: Use the report option so support can review it.
faq.a3: It can be edited shortly after submission, then it becomes locked.

ratings.title: Ratings & Feedback System
ratings.subtitle: Transparent, real, anti‑fraud
ratings.heroText1: Ratings are only meaningful when they are
ratings.heroText2: . On ServiceHub, reviews are submitted after a service is completed.

p1.label: Principle 1
p1.title: Ratings after service completion
p1.desc: Only users with completed bookings can rate.

p3.label: Principle 3
p3.title: Fraud review handling
p3.desc: Suspicious feedback is investigated and removed if proven.

how.title: How ratings work
how.description: A simple but accurate model for fair evaluation.

refund.title: Refund Guarantee
refund.subtitle: Rules and timeline
refund.heroDescription: If the service is not delivered as agreed or a serious issue occurs, we have a defined process for review and potential refund.

principle.label: Core Principle
principle.title: Resolve the issue first; refund if unresolved
principle.description: We first attempt to resolve the issue through fair communication. If not possible, the refund process begins.

conditions.title: When refunds apply
conditions.description: To prevent abuse, refunds are issued only under verifiable conditions.

c1.title: Service not delivered
c1.desc: If the provider does not show up or the service is not performed.

c2.title: Major mismatch with description
c2.desc: If the delivered service clearly differs from what was described.

c3.title: Unagreed extra charges
c3.desc: If additional fees are requested without clear agreement.

fairness.title: Fairness
fairness.description: The goal is fairness for both users and providers.

steps.title: Refund request steps
steps.description: Designed to be quick and trackable.

s1.label: Step 1
s1.title: Submit a report
s1.desc: Describe the issue clearly and attach evidence if possible.

s2.label: Step 2
s2.title: Review and resolution attempt
s2.desc: Support coordinates with both sides to try resolving the issue.

s3.label: Step 3
s3.title: Refund if approved
s3.desc: Refund will be processed via the payment method or wallet.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Timing depends on the issue and review process but we aim for fast resolution.
faq.a2: Refunds may be issued to your wallet or original payment method.
faq.q3: What if the provider does not cooperate?
faq.a3: Decisions are made based on booking records and evidence.

timeline.title: Submit Basic Information
timeline.desc: Name, city or service area, skills and contact information that users should clearly see.

timeline.title: Identity and Account Ownership Verification
timeline.desc: Ensuring the account belongs to a real person and can be held accountable.

timeline.title: Service and Pricing Validation
timeline.desc: Services, pricing ranges and job conditions are reviewed to prevent unrealistic promises.

timeline.title: Trust Badge Activation
timeline.desc: After approval, badges such as “Verified Identity” or “Complete Profile” appear on the profile.

timeline.title: Ongoing Monitoring and Reports
timeline.desc: Ratings, feedback, reports and cancellation rates are reviewed to maintain quality.

guarantee.title: What do we guarantee?
items: Clear display of city, skills and service area
Ability to report issues with fast follow‑up

privacy.title: We respect privacy
privacy.desc: Sensitive information is only used for verification and is never displayed on the public profile.
privacy.noteDesc: A trust badge confirms identity or profile verification, not a 100% guarantee of work results. That’s why rating and refund systems also exist.

items.a: Every provider must pass the basic verification steps. Some also earn additional badges like complete profile or verified portfolio.

items.q: What if I encounter a problem?
items.a: From the booking or provider profile choose “Report a problem”. Support will review the case and may activate the refund process.

items.q: Why are some details not public?
items.a: For security and privacy. Sensitive data is used only for verification.

hero.title: Provider Verification on ServiceHub
hero.desc1: To ensure your booking is safe, we use a multi‑step process to verify service providers. The result is simple:

steps.title: Identity Information Verification
steps.desc: Phone number, basic details, and account ownership verification to prevent fake accounts.

steps.title: Skill and Portfolio Verification
steps.desc: Work history, portfolios, services offered, and transparent pricing are reviewed.

steps.title: Continuous Quality Monitoring
steps.desc: Ratings, complaints, cancellations and professional behavior are periodically evaluated.

process.title: How does the verification process work?
process.subtitle: Step‑by‑step, trackable, and with minimal friction for providers.

auth.terms_text: By continuing, you agree to the Terms and Privacy Policy.
auth.intro_login: Login with your phone number and password to continue.
auth.intro_customer: Create a customer account using your phone number and password.
auth.intro_provider: Create a provider account using your phone number and password.
auth.min_password_hint: At least 8 characters + number or symbol is better

site.supportResponseSla: Initial response is usually within 24 working hours.
site.authMethod: Login is done using mobile number and password. Some accounts may require an SMS verification code.
